validation_gates.reason: Verified the repository, immutable base, target blob, parent and domain pipeline boundaries, Directory Rules conflict, drift register, contributor guidance, CODEOWNERS, and overlapping-work search before mutation.

Preserved the v0.1 trust, source-role, sensitivity, geoprivacy, evidence, lifecycle, receipt, release, correction, and rollback controls while replacing unsupported future-tree claims with pinned evidence and explicit unknowns.
Verified one document H1 outside code fences, ordered headings, balanced fences, final newline, reviewable placeholders, and absence of credential-like content.
All twenty repository-relative Markdown targets were read successfully at the pinned base commit.
No sensitive location data or restricted payload was introduced; exact or reconstructable Fauna detail remains fail-closed, and the document denies direct release or publication authority.

Inspected the documentation workflow inventory and domain-fauna workflow: the inspected Fauna workflow uses pull_request with contents:read, a hosted runner, persisted checkout credentials disabled, and explicit readiness holds rather than release or deployment.

The receipt parsed as JSON, matched the current generated-receipt schema's required fields, allowed properties, patterns, enums, and nested shapes, and its recorded README hash matched the prepared artifact.
Workflow results are unavailable until the draft pull request exists; pending or held checks must not be treated as substantive validation.
Independent human review is pending; this provenance receipt does not authorize merge, release, or publication.

notes: AI-authored documentation revision for the existing pipelines/normalize/fauna README. It grounds the README at the pinned repository commit, surfaces the shared-versus-domain placement conflict, removes unverified candidate file trees, corrects receipt/spec/test references, and preserves fail-closed Fauna sensitivity and non-publication controls. It does not resolve Directory Rules supersession, move the target, implement or activate an adapter/spec/source, establish owners, validate Fauna truth, approve geoprivacy, close evidence, authorize release, or publish. Human review is pending.
